title: BCnmviku 500ML 2 CUP Glass Measuring Cup With Handle, High Borosilicate Glass Three Scales (OZ, Cup, ML/CC for Kitchen or Restaurant Easy To Read
description:
About this item
· 500 ML [2 CUP]. Made from high borosilicate glass. Apply to Gas stove, Microwave, Electric Ceramic stove, Oven and Refrigerator. Not safe in electromagnetic oven. (Please note: dishwasher safe, yet best to wash by hand since, over time, dishwashers can affect measurement markers.) 3 different measurement scales, including Cup, ML, OZ.
· STANDARD SCALE. We carefully measured the ACTUAL VOLUME/CAPACITY of the glass measuring cup to make it clearly for our valued customers like you, please CHECK THE PICTURES.
· Wide mouth design of the cup is easy to clean. V-shaped spout, Liquids can be pouring straight for easy to drainage. Convenient insulated handle.
· Warning: the measuring cup cannot be "dry burning" and ensure that there must be water in the cup when heating. RECOMMENDATION: Hand wash method preferred, avoid washer potentially affecting marking/prevent dry-burning on heating, and ensure liquid in beaker.
· Most chemical liquids, such as acids and bases, can be placed except hydrofluoric acid. COMPATIBILITY:Made of high borosilicate glass, lightweight, apply to microwave, electric ceramic stove, oven and refrigerator, withstand Temperature Range: -4 to 302°F (-20° to 150°C). LIFETIME SERVICES:If there is any problem with the product, please feel free to contact us, we will give you the best solutions and services.
reviews_5s:
This is my absolute go-to for heating a small amount of anything in my microwave.
Just the right size and the handle is EZ on the hand as well! Sturdy and pretty tough, as well.I love that it’s a straight measuring jug. It’s easy to use and makes much more sense than an average measuring cupI got this primarily to microwave my coffee milk in the morning. I found that I like this shape better than regular glass measuring cup. The numbers and markings are easy to read. Don't know about dishwasher because I hand wash mine. Borosilicate glass is great ( that is what they use in chem labs )I am older (upper 70s) and my vision is starting to fail. I have typical 2-cup liquid measuring cups, but I think this design beats them hands-down. The placement of the markings on this measuring cup (oz., ml, and cups) makes it easy to see the measurement you want. If this glass cup should ever break, I'd definitely replace it with the same product.This cup is perfect for frothing milk, and it’s microwaveable!This glass measuring cup is fantastic, I use it a lot. It's very easy to pour, no excess spillage and it measures accurately. I was able to warm something in it using the microwave, no problem. Check it out!Very useful.I bought this for my dad who has to watch his fluid intake and he’s really pleased with itIt's hard to get excited over a "beaker", but this one is done right in every way: accurate, balanced, handsome, and reads both metric and english. If I need to be careful not to wash it in the dishwasher, I can handle that.Great with any liquid. Cleanest pour.
reviews_1s: Glass is too thin for everyday use, it cracked after a few uses. Too expensive for this quality. It’s pretty but not practical for measuring backing ingredients.I very rarely leave a review… I bought one of these previously and it broke while doing dishes, was careful with it, just thought it was kind of a fluke. It’s not… I dropped a few cubes of ice it into to cool down a cocktail…now when I say dropped I mean like right above the measuring cup and it shattered the bottom. These are your regular half moon ice dispenser type ice cubes, nothing hard or large. Will not buy a third, this just isn’t a durable measuring cup for cocktails or any sort of handling. Very dissapointed.Wow was hoping this would be a good choice, NOT!!! Thin and fragile mine broke just by bumping into a coffee cup while washing NOT RECOMMENDEDI used this to mix baby formula since this had measurements on it and it was glass. The formula was room temperature and I used a basic spoon to mix it. It shattered immediately. I do not recommendToo thin for regular / normal useLoved it till I ran it through the dish washer, then all the paint came off the markings. There are still very faint, almost invisible marks where the class was acid etched, but useless now as a measuring cup.I really liked the modern look of this measuring cup. I knew it would be thin glass per other reviews, so that didn’t bother me and I’ve treated it delicately. My problem is that over the course of a couple months, the measurements have faded after washing. 😞 You can only see them at the right angle/reflection (near impossible to read if it’s wet and/or with milk in it). Who knows how long that will last too. So, aside from being a cute mini pitcher - I need to purchase a different liquid measuring cup for accurate measuring/baking. A bit disappointing and waste of money.Product came cracked, not able to use for liquidsMy recently purchaed measuring cup fell off the kitchen counter and immediately cracked. It leaked from the crack after my first use. I was so angry that I just throw it away, instead of sending it back to Amazon! Don't waste your money, it's cheap plastic.one side says 16 oz and other side says 2 cups but they are off by 1/4"...I just don't get it
